name: Intake Agent
summary: Extracted customer, product category, quantity, urgency, location, and missing fields.

name: Planner Agent
summary: Created a quote-to-response task graph with memory, catalog, risk, approval, and learning steps.

name: Memory Agent
summary: Retrieved customer preferences and approved policies from persistent memory.

memories.text: Prefers Dell laptops for new office rollouts.
Prefers conservative delivery promises over fastest possible estimates.
Usually accepts 3-year onsite support when onboarding more than 15 devices.

approvedPolicies: Require manager approval for discounts above 10%.
Include itemized quote PDFs for all orders above $15,000.

name: Catalog Agent
summary: Selected an in-stock Dell laptop and attached 3-year onsite support based on customer memory.

name: Risk Agent
summary: No high-risk pricing or delivery issues found.

name: Quote Writer Agent
summary: Generated a customer-ready quote and internal rationale.

evidence.quoteSummary: 12 Dell Latitude 5440 devices with 3-year onsite support for $14,794.

name: Learning Agent
summary: Prepared to compare human edits against the agent proposal and propose reusable memory/policy updates.
